text: SBI PSU Direct Plan Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from SBI Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-03-13 is ₹38.22.

1Y returns: 25.40%. 3Y annualised returns: 32.81%. 5Y annualised returns: 27.03%. Since inception returns: 3.93%. Compared with category 1Y average 5.81%. category 3Y average 28.28%. category 5Y average 29.79%.
Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 20.96. Sharpe ratio: 1.35. Alpha: 1.82. Beta: 0.93.

Expense ratio is 0.82%. Exit load policy: Exit load of 0.50% if redeemed within 30 days. Minimum SIP investment is ₹500. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
